intro: Atop a glittering mound of salvaged treasure, a powerful dragon coils and watches you with hungry, territorial eyes. The hoard beneath it is enormous.
title: The Dragon's Hoard
description: A territorial dragon guards a glittering hoard. Challenge it - win to claim the hoard, or throw a Ball to catch the dragon itself - or back away and leave it be.

1.label: Challenge it
1.tooltip:
(+) Win for the hoard (high-tier reward), or catch the dragon
(?) A powerful boss
1.selected: The dragon rears up off its hoard with a deafening roar - the fight is on!

2.label: Back away
2.selected: You back away slowly and leave the dragon to its treasure.
